name: Tool Card: Bash
summary: Displays Bash command execution results with command, output, and exit code
goals: Render Bash tool execution cards with command and output
Support collapsible output for long-running commands

specDetail.description: A specialized tool card component for Bash command executions. Shows the command, working directory, output stream (stdout/stderr), exit code, and execution duration.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The Bash command that was executed

constraints: Must highlight exit code visually (green for 0, red for non-zero)
Must support collapsible output sections for outputs exceeding 50 lines
Must provide a copy button for both command and output

acceptanceCriteria.given: a Bash tool execution result is received
acceptanceCriteria.then: the command, output, exit code, and duration are displayed in a structured card layout

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
